items.name: Music Finder
items.desc: Identify songs by title/artist search, YouTube URL, or direct audio file URL. Returns metadata, artwork, streaming links, and a lyrics preview.

params.query: Song title or artist name to search (use this OR url)
params.url: YouTube URL or direct audio file URL (use this OR query)
params.mode: Set to 'recognize' to force audio fingerprint recognition on a direct URL
